observed_frequencies.description: Observed frequencies of employees in each pay increase category (None, Standard, Merit) from the sample, referenced as n_i in the chi-square test statistic formula.

n.description: Total sample size of employees analyzed, used directly in computing expected frequencies E_i = n · p_{i,0}.

proposed_proportions.description: Firm's proposed (hypothesized) proportions for each pay increase category, used as p_{i,0} in computing expected frequencies E_i = n · p_{i,0}.
